mapper.sql: r.id, r.user_id AS userId, r.exercise_id AS exerciseId, e.exercise_name AS exerciseName, r.workout_date AS workoutDate, r.duration_min AS durationMin, r.sets_count AS setsCount, r.reps_count AS repsCount, r.calories_burned AS caloriesBurned, r.completion_status AS completionStatus, r.feedback_score AS feedbackScore, r.remark, r.created_at AS createdAt
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO user_workout_record ( user_id, exercise_id, workout_date, duration_min, sets_count, reps_count, calories_burned, completion_status, feedback_score, remark ) VALUES ( #{userId}, #{exerciseId}, #{workoutDate}, #{durationMin}, #{setsCount}, #{repsCount}, #{caloriesBurned}, #{completionStatus}, #{feedbackScore}, #{remark} )
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM user_workout_record WHERE user_id IS NOT NULL AND exercise_id IS NOT NULL
